1. Calculate the total number of people who will be eating the cookie pies.
This includes Manny, his 24 classmates,
and Mr. Keith.
So, the total number of people is 1 + 24 + 1 = 26.
2. Calculate the total number of slices of cookie pie available.
Each of the 3 cookie pies is cut into 10 slices,
so the total number of slices is 3 * 10 = 30.
3. Calculate the number of slices eaten by the people who will be eating the cookie pies.
Each of the 26 people will have 1 slice,
so the total number of slices eaten is 26 * 1 = 26.
4. Calculate the number of slices left.
This is the total number of slices available minus the number of slices eaten,
so the number of slices left is 30 - 26 = 4.
Therefore, there are 4 slices of cookie pie left.
